'''ngotalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoarial|zoarial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoarial|zoarial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngotalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngotalithi|ngotalithi]] || [[word:ngotaliji|ngotaliji]] || [[word:ngotalishi|ngotalishi]] || [[word:ngotaliki|ngotaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngotaluthuthu|ngotaluthuthu]] || [[word:ngotalujuju|ngotalujuju]] || [[word:ngotalushushu|ngotalushushu]] || [[word:ngotalukuku|ngotalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngotaluthu|ngotaluthu]] || [[word:ngotaluju|ngotaluju]] || [[word:ngotalushu|ngotalushu]] || [[word:ngotaluku|ngotaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngotalufthuf|ngotalufthuf]] || [[word:ngotalufjuf|ngotalufjuf]] || [[word:ngotalufshuf|ngotalufshuf]] || [[word:ngotalufkuf|ngotalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngotalethe|ngotalethe]] || [[word:ngotaleje|ngotaleje]] || [[word:ngotaleshe|ngotaleshe]] || [[word:ngotaleke|ngotaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngotalothotho|ngotalothotho]] || [[word:ngotalojojo|ngotalojojo]] || [[word:ngotaloshosho|ngotaloshosho]] || [[word:ngotalokoko|ngotalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngotalotho|ngotalotho]] || [[word:ngotalojo|ngotalojo]] || [[word:ngotalosho|ngotalosho]] || [[word:ngotaloko|ngotaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngotalofthof|ngotalofthof]] || [[word:ngotalofjof|ngotalofjof]] || [[word:ngotalofshof|ngotalofshof]] || [[word:ngotalofkof|ngotalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngotalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngotalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngotalĂŠthĂŠ|ngotalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngotalĂŠjĂŠ|ngotalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngotalĂŠshĂŠ|ngotalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngotalĂŠkĂŠ|ngotalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngotalathatha|ngotalathatha]] || [[word:ngotalajaja|ngotalajaja]] || [[word:ngotalashasha|ngotalashasha]] || [[word:ngotalakaka|ngotalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngotalatha|ngotalatha]] || [[word:ngotalaja|ngotalaja]] || [[word:ngotalasha|ngotalasha]] || [[word:ngotalaka|ngotalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngotalafthaf|ngotalafthaf]] || [[word:ngotalafjaf|ngotalafjaf]] || [[word:ngotalafshaf|ngotalafshaf]] || [[word:ngotalafkaf|ngotalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngotalasha|ngotalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngotalshĂ«sha|ngotalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngotalrosha|ngotalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngotalmusha|ngotalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngotalyasha|ngotalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongotalnkshĂ«sha|gongotalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongotalnkrosha|gongotalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongotalnkmusha|gongotalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongotalnkyasha|gongotalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngotatalasha|ngotatalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngotatalshĂ«sha|ngotatalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngotatalrosha|ngotatalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngotatalmusha|ngotatalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngotatalyasha|ngotatalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongotatalnkshĂ«sha|gongotatalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongotatalnkrosha|gongotatalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongotatalnkmusha|gongotatalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongotatalnkyasha|gongotatalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngetĂŠlasha|ngetĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngetĂŠlshĂ«sha|ngetĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngetĂŠlrosha|ngetĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngetĂŠlmusha|ngetĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngetĂŠlyasha|ngetĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongetĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gongetĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongetĂŠlnkrosha|gongetĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongetĂŠlnkmusha|gongetĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongetĂŠlnkyasha|gongetĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngotfalasha|ngotfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngotfalshĂ«sha|ngotfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngotfalrosha|ngotfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngotfalmusha|ngotfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngotfalyasha|ngotfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongotfalnkshĂ«sha|gongotfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongotfalnkrosha|gongotfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongotfalnkmusha|gongotfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongotfalnkyasha|gongotfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
